_comment: This is an example credentials.json file for Google Service Account. Fill in the empty fields with your actual values from Google Cloud Console. After filling, rename the file to credentials.json. Instructions: 1. Create a project in Google Cloud Console. 2. Enable Google Sheets API. 3. Create a Service Account and download the JSON key. 4. Copy the values from the downloaded JSON into the corresponding fields below.
private_key:
-----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----
Paste your private key here
-----END PRIVATE KEY-----
